question: What can be used to control the color changes of a computer case's lighting?
answer: A LED switch can be installed.
response: RGB lighting on computer cases can be controlled using a dedicated RGB controller, motherboard software (like ASUS Aura or MSI RGB Sync), or physical switches on the case itself. Some cases also support app-based control via USB or Bluetooth.

Action: [Answer]
Content: RGB lighting on computer cases can be controlled using a dedicated RGB controller, motherboard software (like ASUS Aura or MSI RGB Sync), or physical switches on the case itself. Some cases also support app-based control via USB or Bluetooth.
